Notice Of Motion For Relief From Default; Motion And Memorandum In Support Thereof; Declaration In Support Thereof
Off Calendar Jun-15-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Anna Mar, Plaintiff in pro per
Timothy J. Tomlin, Esq., LAW OFFICES OF JOHN L. FALLAT, (415) 457-3773, for Defendant WESTERN SURETY COMPANY

Hearing is held. ARGUED. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANT WESTERN SURETY COMPANY'S Motion For Relief From Default.

Western Surety Co.'s motion for relief from default is granted. The motion was filed five court days after default was entered and "mistake, inadvertence, surprise, or excusable neglect" is shown. (CCP 473.) California courts have a strong policy to decide cases on their merits. "Gotcha" defaults like this one are viewed with disfavor.

Order is signed

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/RBU)
